tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A is shifting their workload to me, which threatens my afternoon plan. I will likely agree to avoid conflict, even though it increases my stress.

desires: Secure a quiet, uninterrupted hour to process the new workload without triggering interpersonal friction
Complete both project shares by the deadline to maintain my reputation for reliability and avoid future academic penalties
Minimize immediate stress accumulation to preserve my energy levels for tomorrow's sleep discipline

goals.description: Execute the full project scope (own + teammate_A's share) immediately to secure the deadline and maintain reliability reputation.
goals.rationale: My 'achievement' value prioritizes academic/task outcomes above all else. While I am naturally 'avoidant' of conflict, refusing a teammate who has already asked for help would create unnecessary interpersonal friction now or damage my professional standing later. Given the 'deliberate' nature, it is more efficient to absorb the load now than to negotiate later. The goal is to clear the path to a stress-free evening.

goals.description: Work in isolation for the next 90 minutes to process the new workload without interruption.
goals.rationale: To manage the increased cognitive load of two tasks, I need to protect my focus capacity. My 'deliberate' style requires a long planning horizon; rushing or multitasking will increase error risk and future stress. Isolation prevents the 'conflict' that might arise from social interaction while working.

goals.description: Submit both shares by 18:45 to ensure a buffer before the 19:00 deadline.
goals.rationale: This is a procedural milestone derived from the primary task. It aligns with my high 'sleep discipline' and desire to minimize stress accumulation, ensuring I can rest early rather than worrying about submission timing.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances high-priority goal to secure deadline and reputation (achievement). Avoids immediate interpersonal conflict by accepting the load rather than negotiating (avoidant), allowing me to isolate and work efficiently for the next 90 minutes (deliberate) without draining focus on social friction.
